name: The Quality Seeker
context: Professional, 45–65, already decided they want implants. Primary concern is getting it done right by a qualified specialist — not the cheapest option. Fears a fake-looking or failing implant. Distrusts general dentists doing specialty work on the side. Wants one provider who owns the whole process, not a chain of referrals. Board-certified credentials and a clear explanation of the prosthodontist difference are what convert them.
